scripts.validate:sitemap: test -f _site/sitemap.xml && ! rg -q '/pages/' _site/sitemap.xml && test "$(rg -c '<loc>https://zentsu.app/' _site/sitemap.xml)" = "$(rg -c '<loc>' _site/sitemap.xml)" && rg -q '<loc>https://zentsu.app/dial/</loc>' _site/sitemap.xml && rg -q '<link rel="canonical" href="https://zentsu.app/dial/"' _site/dial/index.html && test -f _site/_redirects && rg -q '^/dial.html /dial/ 301$' _site/_redirects
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run validate:html && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:sitemap
